text.message: That was almost always my plan tbh...
aight, imma have to rob u now, sorry
u have all that board to choose
Yeh. None of it is good...
or try and make a deal
anything but just ruining my game
Your game is fine. You can take the 3 hex space
It won't be if you waste your 7s tho
i wont win road nor army
so im build to ten prob
u just cut my network in half
You're soloing me wrecking my hame at this point. But I'm the problem for responding
It was placements. Pointing 109 was a risk
I'd use the knights blue it's getting out of hand
cuz blue doesnt have goated position
Bro I don't want him to move knight
He doesn't seem to do that if not necessary so...
yea then we never get his devs tested
And you were trying to plow me
Maybe don't just focus on me green
u cut me off, then gaslight into me being the target
In response to you soloing me lad
yeap in response to u chopping me
It's my best placement not that deep
You still haven't named a spot that was a better placement for me
And red that block is something lol
I'd focus on your actual opponent
Starting to realise you've produced enough cards you could've won green...
Wait green you care about someone winning?
yeap, ill try to win after u lost
Green second when red gets army
